message:
test(e2e): add cross-connection UPSERT visibility regression tests

Add 4 tests verifying INSERT ... ON CONFLICT behavior across separate
connections to the same file-backed database:
- single_conn_upsert_updates_existing_row (baseline sanity check)
- cross_conn_upsert_detects_conflict (the core scenario from #21)
- cross_conn_do_nothing_skips_duplicate (DO NOTHING variant)
- cross_conn_three_connections_same_key (sequential 3-connection chain)

All 4 tests pass — the pager's refresh_committed_state() from commit
b7644a1 correctly handles cross-connection index visibility.

Ref #21

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
